original: textify(a||(a=(0,h.Z)(["The Clydesdale K7’s history as a cargo ship is proudly displayed in the design of its boarding ramp. The multi-hinged metal slab is able to be swivel down like a typical ramp or keep flat and lower like the bottom of a freight elevator. This clever design allows for pallets of bulk goods to be loaded without specialized equipment at the spaceport.\n\n\t\tYou may exit your ship here."])))

textify(n||(n=(0,h.Z)(["This particular Clydesdale is outfitted for use as a private vessel instead of a bulk shipping instrument, and as such has lower ceilings in place of a wide-open hold. That isn’t to say it lacks in storage space - with the bevy of lockers along the walls and numerous secure storage crates tucked into every nook and cranny, you’d be hard pressed to find a better receptacle for your prizes."])))

textify(i||(i=(0,h.Z)(["The Clydesdale’s cavalcade of cargo capacity continues along the belly of the ship, tucked under the partitioned-off upper deck where weapons, upgrades, and quarters for crewmates lie. The lockers lining the walls trace the industrial steel walls along their north-south journey, interrupted here and there by titanium-reinforced ribs. You can even find the occasional Steele Tech logo stamped into some of them.\n\n\t\tIt feels like home."])))

textify(s||(s=(0,h.Z)(["The hold’s long line of lockers is broken up here by a number of sockets and plugs - helpful for setting installing any heavy duty items you find on your adventures. The previous owner was using this place as a workshop, judging by the metal filings on the floor and rust stains around anchor points of an industrial plasma saw, but any of your discoveries could find a nice home here."])))

textify(r||(r=(0,h.Z)(["The Captain’s quarters, your home away from home, lies in the fore half of the vessel, next to the security console to the north and helm just beyond. The room was built with space saving in mind, featuring a bed that folds up into the wall when not in use, a combination liquid/sonic shower nook, rotating underwear and clothing lockers, and even a combination dish and laundry washer."])))

textify(u||(u=(0,h.Z)(["Just like the Casstech Dad gifted you at the start of all this, the K7 Clydesdale comes with a Steele Tech-issue security table, though this one is a little older and larger. Fortunately the previous owner kept up with the latest security patches, so would-be-thieves will have a hard time cracking this particular nut. It’s just as effective at tracking onboard life-signs as well. If you want to check on your crew, this is the place to do it."])))

textify(l||(l=(0,h.Z)(["No long haul shipping vessel would be complete without a comfortable cockpit, something the K7’s luxurious leather pilot’s chair provides in spades. Cushy armrests encourage you to lounge at the stick in your free time, ready to correct course at the first sign of trouble. It’s certainly nicer than the mandatory stim-injectors MaxCorp makes their pilots endure.\n\n\t\tThe security console isn’t far to the south, should need to check on your crew."])))
